name: board-of-directors
description: Board of Directors — AI-powered strategic decision framework. Convenes 10 director archetypes (Musk, Altman, Hassabis, Li, Nadella, Huang, Pichai, Hoffman, Ng, Jobs) to evaluate complex decisions from multiple strategic angles. Not a substitute for professional management consulting or legal/financial advice.

plugins.name: board-of-directors
plugins.description: Strategic decision framework with 10 director archetypes and 7 shared methodology skills. Orchestrated via /board for multi-perspective analysis, or invoked individually per director.
